title: litsea subumbelliflora
intro: Litsea subumbelliflora, also known as the Fujian litsea or Fujian litsea tree, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Lauraceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Litsea subumbelliflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal use.
